data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for multi-page forms with progress saving. While the linked use case mentions that a patient can complete 80% of the intake form and return later, it does not explicitly confirm that the form is structured as multi-page or that progress saving is implemented in a way that meets the requirement. The lack of concrete evidence regarding the multi-page structure leads to a gap in requirement satisfaction.
gaps: No explicit confirmation of multi-page form structure or progress saving implementation.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the multi-page form structure and progress saving functionality.
